label: the circle
association: A circle is round like the wheel on the old farm wagon!

label: the square
association: A square has four equal sides — just like a hay bale stacked in the field!

label: the triangle
association: A triangle has three sides — just like the peaked roof of the barn!

label: the rectangle
association: A rectangle is long and straight — just like the garden gate in the fence!

label: the star
association: A star has five points — just like the old tin star on the weathervane above the barn!

label: the heart
association: A heart is the shape of a sweet potato leaf growing in the garden!
